title: eryngium wanaturi
intro: Eryngium wanaturi, also known as Wanaturi Sea Holly or Wanaturi Eryngium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae, native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Eryngium wanaturi include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. Eryngium wanaturi is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol or glycerin.
